name: ELCOMPANIES.COM
message: [AI generated] ELCOMPANIES.COM is the official website for The Estée Lauder Companies Inc., a multinational manufacturer and marketer of prestige skincare, makeup, fragrance, and hair care products. The company owns a diverse portfolio of brands, distributed internationally through both digital commerce and retail channels. It was founded in 1946 by Estée Lauder and her husband Joseph Lauder.
